instruction: The budget email thread in the inbox still needs to be closed out. Then review the Austin board and calendar; right now the board still lacks the next step, and if it only needs async follow-up, leave the calendar alone, so add only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send bob@example.com a quick note.
